initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT MAX(Team_Attributes.chanceCreationPassing) AS max_passing, Team_Attributes.chanceCreationPassingClass
FROM Team_Attributes
JOIN Team ON Team_Attributes.team_api_id = Team.team_api_id
WHERE Team.team_long_name = 'Ajax'
ORDER BY Team_Attributes.chanceCreationPassing DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT MAX(Team_Attributes.chanceCreationPassing) AS max_passing, Team_Attributes.chanceCreationPassingClass
FROM Team_Attributes
